reviews.review_text: Falling under the NRMA banner, l would have thought the place may have been kept better. It's in serious need of TLC, gardens are unkempt and need cutting back to make getting caravans in easier without scratching the sides.
Great stay at NRMA, lots of toilets/showers and nice room with tv to chill in. Debbie was the real star of the show, she was so helpful and attentive with every question we had!
In the middle accounts really good for Caravans and utes
We are tenting. Great facilities. 50cents on bus no. 123 to town and back for supplies.

We visited several NRMA, and we were very disappointed by this one. We stayed 3 nights only because the campsite was the cheapest in the city. When we arrived we had an unpowered site as requested, but when we saw the size and condition of the site it was shocking. Vehicles and people are literally piled up on top of each other due to lack of space, a lot of waste was present on our future place, not to mention the vegetation that is clearly not maintained. Fortunately we asked to change and we could. We had a bigger place but invaded by vegetation. The toilets are dirty and the camp kitchen is the worst I have ever seen in Australia.

I think the people who stay are not all very respectful and it’s not the camping’s fault, but how many employees do you have? We only saw one person working in the park during our stay, and she seemed to be doing the amenities and maintenance. Yet it is not for lack of receiving applications... Really a shame because the campsite has potential and it is quite well placed. But no security, anyone can enter, this is not reassuring. I don’t recommend. entrer
Great park lovely helpful hosts set us up in a lovely site 😀😀

Ich kann definitiv nicht empfehlen, hier zu übernachten. Die Sanitäranlagen waren noch in Ordnung – es gibt deutlich bessere, aber auch schlechtere. Die Küche war allerdings in einem sehr schlechten Zustand. Die Kühlschränke wurden offenbar nicht gereinigt, obwohl laut Aushang an meinem Ankunftstag die wöchentliche Reinigung anstand. Auch in den folgenden drei Tagen sah es nicht besser aus. In mehreren Kühlschränken stand unten eine bräunliche Flüssigkeit, und die Herdplatten waren stark zerkratzt und verschmutzt.

Trotzdem musste ich meine Einkäufe dort lagern – meine Einkaufstasche wurde während meines Aufenthalts durchwühlt und zahlreiche Lebensmittel daraus entwendet. Auf Nachfrage wurde mir an der Rezeption erklärt, die Kameras in der Küche seien ohnehin kaum brauchbar und man müsse sich eben damit abfinden, dass sich der Campingplatz in einer unsicheren Gegend befinde. (Wer sich also nach Sicherheit sehnt ist hier anscheinend nach Ansicht der Betreiber falsch?!)

Auch die Anbindung ist problematisch: Zwar gibt es einen Bus in der Nähe, die meisten Verbindungen fahren jedoch weiter unten an der Hauptstraße ab. Als Fußgänger kommt man dorthin vom Campingplatz aus kaum sicher, da weder eine Ampel noch ein Gehweg auf der Seite des Platzes vorhanden ist.

Zusätzlich wird mit kostenlosem WLAN geworben, dieses ist allerdings auf lediglich 1 GB pro Tag begrenzt – was meiner Meinung nach heutzutage nicht mehr zeitgemäß ist.
Great place to stay

Good location and amenities are nice however they have very poor security! Be Careful!! I had a $1200 e-scooter locked up to my motor home and someone cut the locks and stole it over night!

They only had 1 security camera out the front, and the gates (totally unkept) where ripped down along the perimeter making it easily accessible for anyone!

I spoke to the lady out the front and she basically shrugged and said there's not much we can do... it happens a lot in cairns!

For starters... fix the property up, secure the surroundings from these local thieves and Get more CCTV, your customers and safety are priority!

The 2 stars are only for the ladies at the reception, the campsite deserves 0. I recently stayed two nights in this campsite which on the internet seemed to me to be very good, however the reality is very different firstly some pitches (at the bottom of the campsite on overcrowded and therefore make the installation of vehicles difficult), the kitchen is in a mediocre condition it will deserve a makeover without problem, some rats are even present! As for the sanitary facilities, they are also not very clean and for the showers no pressure and evening hot or frozen water, in addition the maintenance of the vegetation leaves something to be desired (tall grasses, tree branch that protrudes over the pitches and hinders the installation), I find it a shame because nrma is a beautiful camping chain but this one deserves to be totally reviewed!! In addition, my vehicle was parked for 2 days under a camping tree and here is the state of my solar panels!
Be careful here our camping stove and my friends bag got stolen
deluxe family cabin for 4 adults and one child. good to have the larger bedrooms, separate toilet and shower and extra living room space
Always enjoy staying at NRMA in Cairns.
The main staff member I spoke to was lovely and very helpful. Sorry I don't remember her name.
Everything was nice and easy and the personal are very helpful and kind !

Everything was great expect the cleaner didnt clean the room as there was vomit on the toilet and walls.
But it does the job for a night
I always stay here .friendly staff..the gardens are lovely..facilities always clean and this last visit we got a doggy treat bag..a wonderful idea

An average Holiday Park that has the perk of being in a central location, a busy place for Juicy Vans. Trailer sites are compact and not well maintained (too many trees to be capturing solar). The toilet/shower block needs a deep clean.

Guest service team are helpful.

I didn't sleep too well over the 3 night stay - the sound of sirens and locals throughout the night, every night. Have relocated to another local Holiday park.

Great campsite near Cairns! The staff are very friendly and welcoming, the facilities are clean and well maintained, and the sites are spacious and well set up. The location is excellent—close to everything you need while still feeling relaxed. Would definitely stay here again!
The bathrooms are really disgusting. In the men's bathroom smells really bad, and also the showers are flooded really often.
Really enjoyed our week here in a cabin. Clean, well-run, everything you need. Only improvement maybe soft pad front of the bunk to stop banging you banging your head

Der Campingplatz ist an sich schön. Personal ist auch SEHR freundlich. Er ist auch toll gelegen, ABER die Küche ist abartig! Die Tische wurden im letzten Jahrhundert gereinigt, dementsprechend sind sie voller Vogelscheiße und dreck der vorherigen Gäste. Essen ohne vorher komplett alles zu desinfizieren ist nicht möglich. Die Toiletten und Duschen sind zwar groß und auch an sich gut, trotzdessen sind sie nicht besonders sauber!
Preisleistung passt nicht wirklich, schade…

We Just checkout from NRMA Cairns holiday park, the first stop in out Road trip tò Brisbane. Probably the only NRMA we will stay.
The stucture and service are ok but the cleaness Is missing.
The amenities smells as no other public toilet meet from Italy, either Airport, railway and shopping centers. That's not surprising as the cleaning is once a day, and in the log the last cleaning was two days ago.
The common area Is even worst as It seem only guest have tò clean It (and of course not all did It). Does the staff schedule some cleaning of the area?
Tò use it for dining we had tò bonificate the area we Need!
Seeing a big rat walking near out caravan or some cockroach in the kitchen might be normal in a open area, but the lack of uncleanli ess Is not acceptable.
Everything we needed! We had electricity & water for our campervan. Facilities were spotless! Staff were super friendly. Good value for money.
Never again.
Always a great place to stay, friendly staff

Just all in all, a good experience. The showers are amazing, the staff is nice and helpful, the pool is actually deep.
The only down side is the lack of an oven in their kitchen.

We have stayed in a lot of places around Australia and were disappointed.
For context we stayed in the cabin for three nights
Cons:
- 1gb of WiFi which doesn’t extend to the cabins (we had admin we were keen to do in our evenings in the cabin which we had to do in the day when we would rather be sightseeing/walking)
- facilities were dirty and not well cared for
- kitchen facilities were fine but extremely bare, just a communal microwave and kettle

Pros:
- cabin itself was great, well kept and clean. The beds and pillows were comfy
- the lady at the desk was lovely
- the bats were cool to see, although loud but it’s a novelty for us

All in all it was okay, it felt like the site isn’t willing to put money into its facilities or getting a WiFi extender.

Das ist leider der schmutzigste Camping Platz den wir in den letzten 2 Monaten in Australien erlebt haben. Abfalleimer Quellen
über, Sanitäre Anlagen sind ecklig, im TV Raum möchte man sich lieber nicht hinsetzen. Bei einer so hohen Gästezahl sollte man einfach 2 mal am Tag zum Rechten sehen und nicht nur alle paar Tage mal. Und beim Pool hat es nicht mal eine Dusche, damit man sich vorher abduschen könnte vor der Abkühlung.
Near airport nice holiday vibes
Only stayed one night and it was a great place! Great location and clean showers with laundry! Everyone was so nice and loved the live music in the cafe.
Great location and facilties for our motorhome stay

I have stayed at many caravan during my travels. I have never had an experience where all of the staff members gave exceptional service throughout my stay. They all went out of their way to make my stay as  comfortable as possible and showed genuine care and interest in guests needs. I am so impressed with the staff at NRMA Cairns.
Small room but quite comfortable for short stays.The room was small but fairly comfortable, which makes it suitable for short stopovers or transit stays

Die Anlage des Campingplatzes ist sehr schön und das Personal sehr nett. Es gibt allerdings einen Kritikpunkt: die Sanitäranlagen sind sehr schlecht gereinigt. Auch, wenn es ein Campingplatz ist, wäre es schön, wenn die Klos regelmäßig geputzt und die Waschbecken gereinigt werden würden. Die ganzen Haare der Vorbenutzerinnen sowie tote Insekten in den Waschbecken sind nicht besonders toll. Außerdem finde ich die Internetseite zum Buchen zwar super, aber dieses ist so unfassbar langsam, daran könnte man auch arbeiten. Für eine Nacht aber okay!
Great site. Bus stop near.

Facilities amazing. Can’t fault the pool, kitchen, bathrooms (especially en suite, defiantly recommend upgrading, especially how cheap it is). ||However, we did not feel safe at all. On arrival there were 3 homeless people just wandering through the campsite, taking keen interest in all the vehicles. We got told do not leave anything unlocked! ||2nd day, we used the laundry to wash our clothes. I hand washed 2 white T-shirts due to them being the only white in the washing. Put the 2 tops out to dry on the line outside & within 10 minutes they have been stolen. ||Asked the cleaner on site if he has seen anything, he replied “yes seen a homeless man having a shower in the FEMALE toilet he then went over to the laundry area” this is when my clothes were stolen.|||So overall nice facilities. But the safety was a huge issue. NRMA need to add a better secure way of entering the site, wether that’s fully gated entrance or security.

Great spot, very handy for layover from airport.
Accommodation was clean and comfortable.
Staff very friendly.
All good great customer service

Petit camping sympa bien situé en ville pour partir l’aventure et faire le plein des aliments et de tout ce qu’on a besoin pour faire la van. La piscine est définitivement un gros plus et les toilettes et douches sont propres
One of the best campgrounds out of about 70 we visited during our Australian adventure

On suite toilet shower available
Pool ok

We've been camping there for 10 days.

The storm water drains are clogged so when is raining there are huge puddles everywhere.

The tent sites are not elevated and during the heavy rains we've got flooded in our tent.

There is not much security, there was food thieves several times and one morning a guy  was stealing our food from the fridges in front of me. I've told him he can't take food like this and he start swearing to me in front of my kids.

I've called the reception to report it and all I've got back from them is "yes, we have it on the camera"

Shower walls are extremely dirty despite there is cleaner there every morning.

Toilet area feels very unventilated - you feel like suffocating.

We had to leave from the kitchen/BBQ area many times because people were vaping.

I won't stay there anymore when we come back to travel again in the area.
Stayed in a cabin, shared toilets and showers had privacy, door locks was clean. Cabin was exactly what we needed. Aircon was great and cool. Very afforable
Good campsite with good facilities. Location is decent and staff were lovely.

A 10 minutos en coche del aeropuerto.
La piscina es agradable para los días de calor. Los vestuarios estaban bien. Puede que a la parte de la cocina le faltase un poquito de limpieza. Pero en general cubre todas las necesidades.
Lo peor de todo es que alrededor hay poca cosa. Tienes que coger el coche para llegar al puerto, está a 5 minutos en coche.
Sauber, ordentlich und unglaublich freundlich
Enjoyed staying there, nice and quiet place.

Pros:
- Very convenient location, within a 20-30 minute walk to the city centre and close to the airport. A great base for activities.
- Staff were friendly, approachable, and genuinely helpful.

Cons:
- The men’s amenities were in extremely poor condition. Toilets and walls were heavily soiled, and there was pubic hair in the showers for several days. Overall cleanliness was far below the standard of other NRMA sites we’ve stayed at.
- Washing machines only operate with cold water.
- RV parking spaces are not properly levelled, which made setup difficult

Absolutely loved our short stay. The lodge was great and just what we needed for one night. The views were amazing and waking up to the sounds of nature were very Peacful. A great way to start our holiday

We spent 3 nights here in an ensuite cabin and had an ok experience overall. While cleanliness was an issue (we found our toilet bowl sprayed with dry urine) staff was very helpful. The premises are a bit run down, rust and stains on the washing machines and many barbecue grills out of order. The location itself is OK, there is a bus going to the city center every hour at least. Overall it was an ok stay but definitely not the best on our north QLD trip.
Très bon emplacement de camping

Wir waren sehr zufrieden mit unserem Aufenthalt. Die ersten drei Nächte waren wir dort mit unserem Camper und wechselten die vierte Nacht in einen Bungalow, da wir diesen zurück geben mussten.
Die Abwicklung (ein- und auschecken) war herausragend! Nicht nur durften wir früher in unseren Bungalow einchecken, sondern durften wir auch länger auf unserem Campingplatz bleiben, sodass wir ganz in Ruhe zusammen packen und sauber machen konnten. So hatten wir an unserem letzten Tag in Cairns und Australien keinerlei Stress und konnten die letzten Stunden noch genießen.

Die Ausstattung auf dem Gelände ist soweit wir beurteilen konnten super. Ebenfalls waren die Toiletten in Ordnung. Manchmal war es aber nicht ganz so sauber, was aber eher an den etwas merkwürdigen Gästen lag. An dieser Stelle möchte ich nochmal betonen, dass die Toiletten und Duschen wirklich ok sind!
$30(29/11/25)for powersite is worth coming, even though bathroom and toilet is not clean for three days. Lot of shade however pool need rail for older people. Have wifi(1gb per device per day)
Wonderful cool room on a hot night. Checked in after hours due to a late amd delayed flight - Process couldn't be clearer thanks to staff.
Great place for price . Nice staff . Pleasant.
Great park, Kris in the office was so very friendly  kind and helpful!

Park was a great location, close to public transport and shops
Facilities were somewhat clean… probably could be cleaner but understanding its probably hard to find employees
Same with the grounds, a bit untidy… feel like it needed a bit of a revamp but didn’t turn us off
It felt safe to us and was comfortable for the 4 weeks we were there

Mocht je overwegen deze camping te boeken, kijk dan verder. Wat een ranzige boel. Poep in de douches, een keuken die nog viezer is dan een standaard Nederlands studentenhuis, overlast van mieren en blijkbaar had de camping ook last van criminaliteit. Ik heb veel reviews terug gelezen en op elke slechte review wordt gereageerd dat ze de feedback meenemen. Maar er wordt niks mee gedaan. Heel erg zonde voor een NRMA camping. Na 5 weken reizen en op mooie, schone campings gestaan te hebben viel dit vreselijk tegen en waren we blij dat we weg waren. De camping heeft alles om een mooie camping te zijn, een goede ligging en vriendelijk personeel. Hopelijk gaat NRMA nu wel wat aan deze camping doen want dit kan niet.

Installations complètes et propres mais notre séjour a malheureusement été gâché par des rats dans la cuisine pendant que l’on cuisinait, un rat mort a l’entrée de la réception en allant acheter un café, vol de nos sandales pendant la nuit et des voisins bruyants. Le personnel était disponible et sympathique, mais l’administration devrait agir sur les vols et les rats.
A great little cabin that was really functional and comfortable for our one night stopover.  Great setup with cabins around a central space.

Full of Europeans with vans!

The road/site setup is crap. If someone is hitching up a caravan you can't get out!

We paid $62 per night for a drive through powered motorhome for 2 adults & 2 kids. Of the 6 caravan parks we stayed at during our 9 day trip, this was the most expensive, but the worst caravan park we stayed at (although this is not necessarily the fault of the park).

The location close to the centre of Cairns is convenient. The amenities are ok, and mostly clean. Our motorhome extension cord was not long enough to reach our power point, while still allowing us to get out of the van without hitting a bush, so it was great that we were able to borrow an extension cord from reception for the duration of our stay.

Bats nest in trees all over the park, but most of them are in a tree right above the camp kitchen. The stench is very strong. This is of course not the fault of the park, and the bats are actually awesome, and all over Cairns so it's to be expected, but is just something for guests to be aware of. I couldn't quite convince myself that it was the smell of the bats, not my food, when trying to eat haha.

The pool didn't seem to be clean, and made my kids' eyes very sore, so they weren't in for long & I didn't let them go back. It was also disconcerting to receive a text message from the park at 8:30pm about a large theft problem, reminding people to lock everything away. This would have been better to be told at check in.

This is a tricky one to rate, as it wasn't a bad stay, but wasn't overly enjoyable either.

Geweldige plek. Gezellig rommelig.
Heel diverse bevolking.
Vliegende honden kolonie aanwezig.

Would've given better rating if the management would take better care of the amenities and the birds covering the motorhome in poops. Not so economical camp grounds when you've got to pay $150 to get the RV washed! Great service at the desk and great coffee.
我们是住营地，树太多，造成营地不太干净，但总的来说还是可以的，干净的卫生间和淋浴，厨房虽然人多，但还是挺干净的。

Such a well kept quiet little park close to everything you need.
Our go to caravan park in Cairns.

Een mooie en fijne camping.
Onze eerste 2 nachten hier doorgebracht.
Enige minpuntje was dat de WiFi geen goed bereik had.
Verder een aanrader.

This park is a conundrum to rate. It has the potential to be a beautiful park with the large trees, clean amenities and pleasant but simple pool area. It is quite central, a 10 min drive to most shopping and the foreshore. However the sites have been basically left unmaintained and some work is definitely needed - straggly long grass edged the slab and the rest of the site was weeds. And then there are the thefts - we had our bike locked but this was cut and stolen. And our neighbours also would have had theirs stolen too only they disturbed the thieves.  We were told after that this is a problem for this park. They do have a security man that goes thru the park but from what we witnessed this is a waste of time as a car driving around is no deterrent. The park did send a generic text message to say lock things up ( which we did) but it would have been more effective if the check in person had mentioned the issue on arrival and we would have left our bikes on our van.  Having said all this we never experienced any other issues and the park was really quiet.

Located pretty nicely in the city, short drive to beach and the CBD.

Kitchen is nice enough, Showers leave a little to desire but are okay. Pool is good. They have like a TV room for kids i think. Have washing machines coin operated.

My big issue with the place is the Bats very very noisy in the morning, but that's not really the parks fault. Bats will bat.

Well I would like to say something positive but our experience here was the worst in Australia.  We have travelled and camped at a hundred parks and never been robbed before. This was the first park where I have received a text warning about theft just after check in?? Ok so you are aware of it and it happens on a regular basis. My $3000 MOUNTAIN BIKE was stolen out the back of my Ute locked with a bike cable, never to be seen again. There is 1 camera that monitors the front gate and that's it. Minimal to no lighting around the park. Easy access over boundary fences so it's a criminals shopping dream. Yea they have a security guy drive through a couple of times but his routine, lack of light no internal security cameras and low fences do little to protect guests. Cairns in general has a youth crime problem so be warned and find somewhere else maybe out of the CBD but not here!
Basic accommodation, but value for the money. Especially around this time of year when accommodation is at a premium
Great staff, nice campground, clean kitchens &bbq station.

My bf and I spent almost a month here during our backpacking trip and we really liked it. Kitchen area is nice and bathrooms are always clean. Staff was also always very kind with us and willing to help. If we come back to Cairns, we will definitely come back!
Great holiday park. Only 2km from railway and shopping centre. Cabin was relatively clean. The blinds and chairs could be cleaner but overall clean and very comfortable.
Great place to stay friendly staff
Great stay. Smallish sites. Walking distance to town and the bus stops. Staff helpful and very friendly.

Lovely staff and very clean room with SUCH A COMFY BED. We stayed in one of their lodges.

The walk to Cairns central esplanade was longer than we though but we got our steps in!

Can’t fault the facilities at this camp site though.
Great ensuite lodge excellent value for money
The best Caravan Park in Cairns - a bike ride to Cairns Central.  Beautiful Swimming Pool, Thursday night pizza van on site, fantastic staff.  10/10
Private site, friendliness staff & great location!
Great place for our son to stay while attending Tafe. Staff very accommodating and helpful. Will stay again
Nice little holiday park close to everything clean tidy and cheap 👌
El camping muy bueno, teníamos lo que necesitábamos. Baños y duchas estaban limpias, y cualquier duda que teníamos el equipo nos ayudaba. Los trabajadores muy agradable también, recomendaría 100%
Lovely campsite. Great location. Amenities were great. Toilets/ showers clean. Decent price also. Site was big enough for us.

Arrived having pre-booked for 2 nights.
Lovely warm welcome at the (busy) office.
The warnings about security were a bit daunting but appreciated. The active night-time security patrol was reassuring to a degree.
A great location - $1 return bus ride into the City so no parking or DUI worries.
The ameneties were plentiful and cleaned around mid-day which is sensible with customers in mind.
Thursday was Pizza night - freshly made pizza from a van in the park. Italians showcasing their skills - absolutely delicious.
Only comment I would make is to provide a mop and bucket available for the showers - some people have not had  basic training in consideration of others!
Only reason for 4 stars - we had smokers on 3 sides which spoiled the sitting outside experience. One even blatantly smoking pot!
We would definitely use this park again now we know the layout.
Really nice campground! Lots of cooking equipment, clean amenities and a very friendly & helpful team at reception :)

Long time visitor to nrma and once again not disappointed AT all fantastic check in clean toilets well maintained grounds
Thank you
Glenn

Good location in Cairns and the Esplanade is also within walking distance.
Very clean and well equipped. Very friendly staff.

Nous avons appelé à 9h et avons eu la chance de trouver un créneau dès 11h le jour même pour notre van dans ce Park que nous recommandons ! Spot bien situé, ombragé, facilités correctes et centrales, et surtout, grande proximité avec le CBD vite accessible grâce à un bus qui passe très proche de NRMA.
Great staff, great facilities. I had ensuite cabin. Was fantastic and very good rate.

Once again we have had a wonderful stay
Check in was wonderful with a wonderful smile we have been here lots of times too many to count and the service is always great
Site was the one we like and next year will ask for it again 🤞🏻toilets were well maintained don’t have any problems whatsoever
Glenn and Carole
Friendly staff. Clean amenities and nice shady parking .

Excellent spot and gardens are lovely. Sites are pretty tight, so found it easier to park in the general camping area.

Super busy so you have to book ahead.

This campsite is in a good location for cairns city, only a short drive. However the unpowered camp spots are extremely tight, we felt we had no room to put our awning up or to have any privacy at our car. The amenities were okay, lots of them and decently clean. The safety of this camp felt unnerving, due to reading past reviews however we had no trouble. The kitchen was extremely unclean. I felt this was very overpriced for the small camp site allocated. The lady at reception was lovely & check in was smooth.
Stayed here a few nights, check in was good, service really good. Security and overall safeness could be improved.

Modern ablution block and close to city but that's it.
Expensive, stuck in the 80s, screeching curlews at night, poor lighting, poor maintenance.
Gate code post broken and not repaired for weeks. Large poles of leaves and palm fronds piled up and not removed.
Has all the hallmarks of screwing customers for $ by not maintaining. Try ingenia or cool waters or crystal cascades or Fishery Falls for pet friendly parks
We stay here for 5 weeks in total and Nichole and staff in reception could not be more helpful. Clean tidy park in good location to town was an easy walk . Highly recommend
You get what you pay for

If you value a good night's sleep then this is not the camp ground for you, constant sirens wailing all night whatever the night of the week. The toilet facilities were not cleaned enough for the number of guests staying and we too encountered a violent burglary situation in the middle of the night at the campground. Security is ineffective and I suspect the same burglars target this campground on a regular basis. Easy pickings. For the high cost to stay here this is not acceptable.

Sorry guys but after 8 weeks on the road this was the least favourite park...it feels so unloved and uncared for.  The amenities were unclean and grubby. The whole place, the shared amenities, the gardens, the very unsafe wonky pathways, need some time and care and maintenence and cleaning.

Must say I was very impressed with the staff at this location. Knowing full well that crime is an issue this is the only park where I have seen proactive measures put in place to avoid your property being stolen. Boom gates. Nightly security patrols and on check in you are given plenty of information on how to keep your items safe. SO if you had property stolen from here you probably deserve it! Facilities are excellent likewise location. Only downside the caravan sites are quite small making arrival and departure squishy. Would def stay here again.

I found this park great. Location was perfect especially if u have a bike. So close to Esplanade. Staff was super efficient. Any problem was attended straight away, eg green ants next to site: they came and cut the tree down, toilets needed cleaning: attended immidently, felt save all along, large camp kitchen had all you need, bring your own crockery. Stayed 5 nites and loved it.

The campsite is nice despite the strong smell of garbage at the entrance where our pitch is located. However, be very careful, I no longer feel safe at all, I had $800 worth of equipment stolen in the middle of the night while I was sleeping. Security that runs by car but is totally ineffective, no cameras and of course no responsibility from the campsite. I would not recommend it to anyone, for so little security and despite the rarely cleaned toilets and showers, I prefer to go to a freecamp, at least I will know what to expect and I will not pay $45 for a night where I am not at ease.

Motor home-Sites small, leaf foliage everywhere. Needs to be more regularly gardened.
We asked for a slab site, not under a tree- given a site for check in.
Upon check we were given another site under a tree, no slab, uneven, and ontop of tree roots. Dirt site!
Bat colony has also moved in!
Amenities were dirty and pool PH levels were out, resulting in sting red eyes after pool use.
Had to speak to manager to arrange a site move to an acceptable site for our RV- two site changes in our 9 night stay.
Not up to NRMA standards
You expect more when paying top dollar
Will never stay here again- second stay in two years, thought we’d give you a second chance - but never again!!!!

Green ants are a real problem here I asked to be put on an open site and was next to a tree. My motorhome was crawling with hundreds of green ants. None inside thank goodness.  Take the Aeroguard if you need to stay here. If you don’t have good insect screens it would be a major problem.

Perfecte camping vlakbij de stad. Het personeel is ontzettend vriendelijk en meedenkend. Faciliteiten ruim voldoende voor de grootte van de camping en ook de keuken en barbecues waren goed. Er staan 3 koelkasten die voorzien zijn van sloten en ook rijdt er ‘s nachts meerdere keren security over de camping.
Nice quiet place pool lovely staff would stay again 😄

I got an unpowered site for my tent at NRMA Cairns holiday park, The facilities are always clean and tidy with the amazing wonderful staff that makes this holiday park the one to stop in for a couple of days or stay up to six weeks,
The facilities include wonderful shower units, toilet blocks, laundromat, TV room, a lovely swimming pool and a camp kitchen all wheelchair friendly.

This is the worst caravan park I have ever stayed at. we were placed on the end on site 86, on one side was next to hwy road. very loud and then not even room as everyone in the sites were so squished next to each other. The showers were trickling out and unclean.

didn’t have a very nice stay here at all
campsites are so small and confusing with water taps and grey water  right in the middle of your camp, booked with our friends and we got all split up when checked in.
very hard to get bigger vans in, people hitting trees and things.
needs to be maintained better, hanging branches and leaves covered the roads you couldn’t see where to walk was mainly dirt as grass couldn’t grow being covered in leaves

camp kitchen was disgustingly dirty and not maintained
amenities didn’t get cleaned our whole stay ( 5 nights ) the soap ran out to wash hands at day 2 and never got refilled, don’t expect a hot shower if there is anyone else in there showering, had to wait till it was empty to shower otherwise it was a cold one.
stayed in school holidays so their busiest time and costly so you would think they would have some maintenance happening considering every site was filled $$$$

sorry but we will never be back

C’est juste dommage d’avoir était sur un emplacement sale, c’est certainement d’ancien campeur mal éduqué mais ça aurait été bien que ce soit nettoyé.
Le personnel à l’accueil était agréable et les sanitaires et camp kitchen étaient propres. C’est un bon rapport qualité prix car on est vraiment bien situé.
I didn’t stay in a room but the facilites were extremely well kept - I loved this camp spot
Les places unpowered sont entassées, y'a des cadenas sur les frigos et 1go par appareil par jour
We stayed two nights in the campsite and we loved it. Great faculties, quiet and great location. Security at night time and code on gate so you feel extra safe. Staff so helpful and professional.

Very busy caravan park. Has a pool and has a security patrol some nights. Have stayed 2 x. A little more expensive and unflexible with site swaps. Felt secure. A mixture of high end vans and motorhomes plus back packers. Has camp kitchen facilities

Have stayed here twice now, in a self contained cabin and love it. Close to Cairns and it's quiet and friendly. Staff are fabulous. Look forward to coming back again soon. Cabin is equipped with all we required and the location here is ideal for getting around.
A very tight caravan park, amenities are adequate. Gets very busy late afternoon with travellers, normal hustle and bustle noise.  Great location close to the city, secure location.
The whole park needs a good scrub… ladies in the office were most helpful. The position of the park is very convenient.  Lock up your valuables  as things got taken from campsites during our stay.

Our Cabin was very clean on arrival
Great communal kitchen area with good facilities.
Reception Staff were all very helpful.

Not the NRMA standard that we know. The kitchen was incredibly dirty and only half of it worked. The amenities were also very dirty. Many of the people were very inconsiderate with the facilities, which is probably why they were so dirty. We won't come back for the price.
Service with a smile. Always grateful to help. We've had a wonderful experience everytime staying here (third time now).

Prima plek. Je merkt wel dat dit een andere NRMA locatie is want het is er minder schoon en netjes. Faciliteiten zijn niet wat je ervan verwacht. Locatie is prima. Helaas is er zelfs een dief geweest die een korte broek heeft gestolen 😂
Unacceptably small unpowered sites. You will need a van with sliding doors to be able to open them all the way. Good luck with a side opening roof top tent.
Super camping ! Il y a tout ce que nous avons besoin !

I stay here every time I attend an event at the Cairns Tanks, as the accommodation is both close and affordable. I usually arrive after hours, but accessing my room key and boom gate number from the after-hours safe box is always easy. Each time, I’ve stayed in one of the cabins, which are air-conditioned and surprisingly quiet considering their proximity to a busy road and airport

We arrived after office hours and appreciated that the check-in process was straightforward and easy to follow. However, the park's location is a bit far from supermarkets and major attractions, which made getting around less convenient for us.The facilities are mostly shared and not quite suitable for our needs. Unfortunately, all better-equipped units were fully booked, so we couldn't upgrade. We also found the Wi-Fi signal in the room to be quite weak. Due to these factors, we decided to cut our stay short and checked out after just one night.

Very large communal kitchen area with good facilities.
Staff at reception were all very helpful.
Only downside is the showers/bathrooms aren’t cleaned very often

Nous sommes restés 3 nuits sur un site avec électricité, la personne a la réception était très gentille et à l’écoute !
L’emplacement du camping et de notre emplacement était top, nous avons eu aucun soucis sur ça !
Cependant, les sanitaires ne sont vraiment pas propre…. Que ce soit côté homme ou femme, peut être un peu plus de nettoyage pendant la journée
Really nice place. Cheap but with all services you need. We had a problem with our car and needed to call a mechanic, the girl at the reception was super kind and helpful.
Great place to stay, lovely location and nice staff!

Spent 2 nights in an ensuite cabinUnfortunately can't reccomend.Lovely area and rainforest vibe grounds but unfortunately the room smelt like mould and mildew.There was mould and moisture in alot of places including the split system.The floor in areas where soft, potentially from water damage.The bed was comfortable and linen was clean but that's about it unfortunately. Althought the room isn't overall expensive it was a pretty prominent issue for the price.

Wir haben 2 Nächte hier verbracht.
Der Standort ist echt super und der Service ist sehr gut. Leider könnten die Sanitäranlagen öfter mal gereinigt werden am Tag.
Preis-Leistung stimmt und wir kommen wieder.

Unbeatable location, close to airport yet very quiet. But, first and foremost, the friendly staff and management looked after us unbelievably. Too complicated to explain in a review but enough to say we actually caused our own dilemma and the staff leapt to our rescue which they really didn’t have to do at all. Their gesture was absolutely appreciated and is an indication of the helpfulness and generosity of FNQ folk. The park itself is clean and welcoming, quite big but set amongst tropical foliage, very pleasant. Many thanks to staff and management for a truly enjoyable stay.
Sanitaires et cuisine sales. Vraiment pas à la hauteur.
Loved it
Second time here & will definitely return.  Love the concrete slabs. Staff are only to willing to please you.  Short walk to Botanical Gardens...
IT was a great Experience and they had some good recommendations for places to visit.

Only needed something for one night that wasn’t too expensive and was close to where we wanted to go. I did have a little trouble getting up onto the top bunk, but we’re not as young as we used to be 😜
Great location, decent facilities. Close to airport and campervan drop off

I stayed at the NRMA Cairns Holiday Park for 4 nights.
And I have to say it was really very quiet. The holiday park can't be blamed for the heatwave, because it was already a bit warm in the tent :-)
Otherwise there is a pool. Unfortunately there aren't enough loungers. It's first come, first served.
There is a laundry where you can wash your things. A cooking area with lots of fridges is right next to the campsite.
And what's really good is that the internet is stable and fast everywhere on the campsite.
A small lounge with a TV right next to the laundry was a great place to cool off during the heatwave.
Lovely rooms, well kept and cleaned. Good amenities. Outdoor bbqs were spotless. But far from town but can easily get a bus or uber

Super friendly personnel, nice and big kitchen, unfortunately male amenities smell like one big piss since over a week!, shower semi working, half broken and quite dirty in general. You should work on the cleanliness of your facilities. Another plus for the good location and easy connection to the rest of the town.

Great affordable place to stay in Cairns! Located a few miles from downtown, and close to the airport.

There’s buses that run a few blocks away from the park and one can also use Uber to/from the airport.

They have a little convenience store and coffee shop, and campground facilities for campers and RV’s too.

Leider waren die Sanitäranlagen schmutzig. Trotz angeblich täglicher Reinigungen waren an allen vier Tagen, an denen wir dort waren, die Becken und WCs schmutzig und wurden nicht gereinigt. Campingplatz ist weit von der eigentlichen Stadt entfernt. Hier muss man mit Bus oder Auto hinfahren, ansonsten 50 min  zu Fuß.

Der Campingplatz ist recht gut gelegen. Bushaltestelle um ins Zentrum zu gelangen ist in kurzer Gehdistanz erreichbar.
Der Platz sowie die Sanitären Einrichtungen und Küche sind schmutzig und vernachlässigt. Ein liebloser Platz.
Les oiseaux font beaucoup de bruit, les emplacements très serré et mon emplacements avait un arbre au milieu. Pas facile pour ce garer avec une rooftent

Wir waren 2 Nächte hier mit einem Campervan und hatten Powersite gebucht und dann eine Woche später nochmal 1 Nacht. Kein Vergleich! Die Lage ist gut, Bushaltestelle wenige Minuten entfernt,  allerdings war unser Bus in die City (Nr 123) immer sehr verspätet.
Beim ersten Mal übernachten alles entspannt. Heute:  der Campground komplett voll, seit Stunden ein run auf die Duschen,  nicht mal Händewaschen war möglich.
Unser Stellplatz Nr 54 ist am Durchgangsweg zur Dusche. Mehr Verkehr als in der City🙄.
Nun, man kann nicht immer gewinnen. 🤷‍♂️
Jedes Händetrocknen ist mega laut.
Positiv: es gibt schon früh morgens guten Kaffee an der Rezeption.
Und wie gesagt,  die Nähe zur Bushaltestelle.
Flughafen hat wirklich nicht gestört,  da es nur wenige Flüge sind.
For the price really good. Don't expect an deluxe hotel, the shared toilet and shower were okay. The rooms are okay. The bed is nice.

Wir haben hier mit dem Campervan für 3 Nächte übernachtet als Familie 1 und 4 Jahre. Der Pool ist klein jedoch für eine Abkühlung ausreichend. Die Sanitäranlagen sind sauber und gut. Wir konnten sogar am letzten Tag wegen dem Abflug am Abend ein paar Stunden länger bleiben ohne einen weiteren Tag zu buchen. Vom Platz aus kommt man sehr gut mit dem Bus für 1 Dollar in die City und zurück. Ein weiterer Vorteil ist dass man die Gasflaschen über einen Partner vor Ort nachfüllen kann. Der Flughafen ist nah jedoch stört er nicht
Powered ensuite site, clean and newly built. Lovely little pool. Leafy shady sites very friendly and helpful reception staff. Little cafe on site. About 5 min easy drive to main shopping precinct.
The ladies at the reception are just amazing as well as other staff. Thank you so much!

En general bien, se respira mucha tranquilidad y para visitar la selva y el arrecife esta bien ubicado, aunque un poco lejos andando del centro de Cairns. Podrian poner gel de ducha y champu en los baños, ademas de una escalera para subir a la cama de arriba.
Friendly and helpful staff. Decent sized lot. Clean amenities. A little far from  city center but we were aware of that and it was a 12 min Uber ride from the airport. Great value for the price.
Such lovely hosts very kind and welcoming!! Beds were sooo comfy!

I had a great stay at NRMA Cairns Holiday Park. The facilities were clean, the staff was friendly, and the location was excellent. The only downside was the limited facilities for kids. Overall, a pleasant experience and would recommend for families looking for a quiet, relaxing stay.
Good, clean amenities. Whole thing is clean
Great friendly camping spot to relax and enjoy. Felt safe and amenities were great also. Friendly and helpful staff.
It was really good to stay, the toilets and shower were clean
It's an okay location. Can get a bit noisy.
Nice park, not too far away from the city and beaches

Fantastic close to town campground with nice leafy sites and clean facilities.
Easy place to navigate your way round Cairns from here, there is an accommodation style to suite everyone☺️
Staff great very helpful, great shade except for the green ant's extremely hurtful on us. Licacation is great except for plane's.
Staff were really nice and helpful, the room was in great condition  and well priced. Would stay here again.

Great location, but park infrastructure very tired. Caravan sites very small, trouble finding space for 4WD. Great shady trees, however they are variety that drops excessive leaves. Appears no attempt by park managers to tidy up leaf 🍁 litter at all. When we arrived, our concrete slab was covered with leaves, that had been there for quite a while.

I give 2 stars because the staff did a gesture for us but really I post this comment as a warning. The camping itself is good enough, big kitchen and showers etc. BUT we stay 3 nights and got our food stolen in the fridge + some of my clothes. So if you want to book here, go ahead but stay next to your laundry and be very careful with what you put in the fridge.
And please NRMA : find a way to bring more security in that camping, most NRMA campings are good so it was disappointing.
Too noisy
It was in a good location and the people around were nice. The most social stay ever.
Great location.  Good amenities .  Nice staff.

Stayed here for 3 nights and is in a very good location. The trees at the parks are an issue as they have stained our awning and the roof of our van will need hours of cleaning. Also as the trees have vine like things that hang down and touch the caravan, we have had thousands of ants all over the van. We stayed there a week ago and they are still everywhere.

Not a bad little camp, sites were pretty tight. Amenities were very nice and clean. No a bad little pool. Pretty noisy as close to airport and main road but really not a bad spot for a couple of days. |Staff were really lovely and very welcoming, it was rush time so they were run off their feet.
Loved our 3 night stop here. Great rates compared to other holiday parks. Good camp kitchen and bathrooms. Also a cool pool.

Nice and close to the city
Clean rooms 👌

Noisy being so close to the airport and on a busy artery. The trees are beautiful but like a leaking umbrella (heavy drops on the roof) during a heavy rain, which we encountered both our two nights there 😀
Stayed here last year A great park so booked again
Nice caravan park as long as you like  sardine tin type parking
Grassed powered sites, most offered some shade.  Facilities clean and sanitary.  Wifi patchy and unreliable.  Bus stop 5 mins walk enabled travel rough the city and northern beaches.
Not a bad site at all - just not much to do with kids. Service is impeccable and they couldn’t do more to help during our stay

De slechtste camping waar we zijn geweest tijdens onze 7 weken durende camper trip.

+De check in was vriendelijk en snel.
-schoonmaak van de douches en wc’s is minimaal. Ik denk dat er slechts 1 keer per dag met de franse slag wordt schoongemaakt.
-De plaatsen van de unpowered plekken zijn enorm klein. Zie foto. Dit is niet de parkeerplek maar de camping plaats.
-Park heeft totaal geen sfeer.
-De gemeenschappelijke keuken is vettig en smerig.
-de camping zit naast het vliegveld en het vliegverkeer begint al in de vroege uren. De camping is ook redelijk ver buiten het stadscentrum.
-de Wifi had een zwak signaal, was onstabiel en sprong er steeds uit.
-De prijs kwaliteit verhouding is uit balans. Een unpowered plek kost 45 dollar. Voor dit geld heb je veel betere campings.

We stayed here in our caravan a few weeks ago! We also stayed at this park 6 years ago & thoroughly enjoyed our stay. The sites were well maintained & there was a very obliging manager who provided parking assistance! This time we were extremely disappointed with the general cleanliness & upkeep of the park & it's amenities. Not enough staff for such a big park, definitely! Totally disappointed with our stay!!!

We stayed at NRMA Holiday Park for about 4 weeks and felt very comfortable here! The kitchen and sanitary facilities are good, there is a refreshing pool and the location of the campground is great (10 minutes drive into city). I especially appreciated the staff at the campground - everyone was very friendly and always helpful. And they always made me very tasty coffee - thank you!!! :)
budget friendly, quiet, not very large in size. We were 3 friends so we have one lodge and it was a lil small rest was ok

Actually a nice quiet site let down by noise near the kitchens which continue into the early hours of the morning and dirty bathrooms. The campsite appears halfway between a youth hostel and a campground and I suspect NRMA treats it as such by not tossing out those making the noise. Away from the unpowered sites it seems much quieter. Request a spot at least 50m away from the kitchen if you intend to sleep well. Also agree with other reviews that the bathrooms need cleaning more often. These issues are not new and appear to be repeat concerns from multiple reviews.

Kitchen is full of European backpackers who party till 11pm. Then you get a brief respite until the night shift gets home at 3:30am, where they too are laughing in groups and having loud conversations in the kitchen till about 4am before they too settle down.

They know they’re loud as they shoosh each other but 30 seconds later start yelling again. They will walk through the campsite right next to your tent at 3:30am talking as if it was 10am and they’re off to Sunday lunch.

To be fair the kitchen does seem to project the sound out into the campsite, but the backpackers don’t seem to make any attempt t keep their conversation to a whisper at 3am either.
We enjoyed our stay but it was noisy and the showers and toilets weren't very clean. Bit disappointed.

Campingground liegt sehr zentral. Dadurch wird er von vielen Campern genutzt, die ihre Roadtrips starten oder beenden. Leider war es abends in der Küche recht laut, weil viele Camper dort gefeiert haben. Es wurde sich nicht an die Nachtruhe gehalten. Vorbeifahrender Security hat nicht eingegriffen, was schade ist.
Nice sites but the amenities are awful. Just a backpackers place, very dirty.

Unacceptable experience at the campsite

Dear,

I would like to express my dismay after my stay at your campsite, which turned out to be the worst experience of my trip to Australia.

In addition to the incessant noise at night, individuals had the audacity to openly offer drugs, including to my partner. When we sought help at reception to report these opportunistic behaviors, no one intervened, thus worsening our feelings of insecurity and neglect.

These incidents are deeply disturbing and seriously damaging the image of your campsite.

I urge you to take concrete measures to ensure the safety and peace of campers.

Sincerely,

4 stars for location and price.
Camp spots were a muddy from the recent rain but manageable. Bathrooms were busy and require a little more attention to cleanliness. But overall okay.

The camp site would have been ok if it was clean. The lodge was dusty. We stayed 3 nights and I doubt the toilets and showers were cleaned in that period of time. The kitchen was disgusting. Food left dried on the BBQs and worktops, on the tables and on the sinks, which is not just disgusting but also dangerous considering the quantity of wildlife that there is in Australia... In fact we saw a rat, and we were lucky it was just a rat.

Februar 2024: 3 Sterne: Bisschen weit weg, um nach Cairns zu kommen. Mit Bus okay.

April 2024: 4 Sterne: Dieses Mal haben wir für 2 Nächte ein Ensuite Studio und nach 3 Monaten im Campervan ist das Luxus pur! Den Campervan haben wir noch und mit dem Auto gibt es nur kurze Wege 😀. Wir genießen unseren Aufenthalt sehr! Klimaanlage!! Eigenes Bad, supersauber und wunderschön!! Überdachte Terrasse!!
Nice camp sites, very friendly and helpful staff. Perfect located for the daytrips from the harbour.

Good campsite, nice amenities, great pool.
Too bad there were a lot of ants who covered the Motorhome.
Stayed here for too long - we got robbed once and attempted again and the security didn’t care much. The amenities are at best OK. The receptionist were helpful.
Cheap, but dirty kitchen and amenities. The unpowered sites are even too small for a van… you hear the noise of the airport.

Vi valgte denne campingplads da vi havde været på andre NRMA campingpladser vi har overnattet på. |Vi havde egentligt tænkt på at bruge 3 nætter på campingpladsen men ombestemte os ret hurtigt. Parken er meget mørk og trængt. |Badeværelserne trænger til at bliver gjort grundig rent. Der er meget sand på gulvet og trænger til at blive tjekket i løbet af dagen. ||Køkkenet har en fin størrelse, indeholder både barbecue, køleskab og fryser, men vi havde ikke meget lyst til at bruge det. Da vi var færdige med aftensmaden løb der to rotter rundt mellem borderne.||Vi kom i snak med nogle andre unge mennekser som havde haft indbrud i deres bil, og fået stjålet blandt andet pas. Politiet havde åbenbart sagt til dem at det var meget almindeligt i denne park. ||Derudover ligner det at der er forladte telte rundt omkring, blandt andet ved køkkenet.||Receptionisten var meget rar og hjælpsom da vi kom. ||Af ovenstående årsager giver vi kun parken 1 stjerne.

Nous sommes restés 3 nuits au camping en campervan.
Les sanitaires et douches étaient sales et aucune passage de ménage n'a été fait entre les 3 jours. La cuisine est très sale également, on ne savait pas où poser nos affaires pour pouvoir préparer nos repas.
Nous sommes restés car l'emplacement est super a côté du centre ville, mais vraiment a contre cœur car nous avions déjà payé les 3 nuits d'avance. Des personnes entrent également dans le camping et fouillent les poubelles qui n'ont pas non plus été vidées pendant les 3 jours.
Très déçus car nos autres expériences NMRA étaient supers !
A very nice and helpful host welcomed us! The facility is well located!

The rooms were dirty and full of dust. We even had an ant trail behind the bed. And there were spiders between the windows and the mosquito net. The mosquito net was outside and the spiders were inside. You could see that the space between the net and the window hadn't been cleaned for a long time. So we were not
able to airing the room. Although the roomstank.

They had only an outdoor kitchen (too many mosquitos for an outdoor kitchen) and more barbecue facilities than hotplates. And these area was also not clean. The tables were dirty
The Bathrooms were dirty too and were not cleaned every day. Dead mosquitos on the wall of the showers and pee and co... on the Toilette for several days.

Wlan was available but really bad.
20 min to grocery store (walking)
40 min city Center (walking)

We are travelling for 4 months now and never experienced a holiday park like that.

La verdad es que el camping es estupendo.
Frigoríficos comunes, barbacoas, zona de lavado y planchado.
Piscina.
Parcelas con sombra.
La unica pega es que los baños a mi parecer no los limpiaban las suficientes veces a lo largo del día.
Pero sin duda un camping al que volvería
Stayed here numerous times, on my own for work, and with my 3 daughter on vacation. Great location, clean amenities, lovely staff and willing to help with just about anything. 4/5

One of the best parks we've been to.
Clean amenities, great laundry facility, and nice kitchen.
Most of all, really helpful and kind staff.
We enjoyed our stay, thank you.

Venturing further afield on a Dive trip we stayed a few days before and after going out to Sea on a dive charter at NRMA Cairns.||We stayed in their cabins, which are quiet, clean and very convenient to easily base our selves while enjoying the attractions of Cairns.||The rooms have comfortable beds, very clean, roomy enough and have air conditioning which helps to get a good nights sleep.||We prepaid breakfast in the small outside kitchen enjoyed the friendly staff while they did their work.||I will stay here a rain any time.||Cheers Peter|
Guter Campingplatz
Campers van
Friendly staff, small market inside, nice pool and great small cabins.
Übernachteten in den Cabins die sehr sauber und schön eingerichtet sind und für 99$ ca 60€
Super freundliche Rezeption, hilfsbereit und nett. Kann ich nur empfehlen.
Love it 😀

Il campeggio è ottimo dotato di una bella zona lavanderia con sala di aspetto di fianco con divanetto e giochi per bambini vi sono anche zone barbecue e piscina ci siamo trovati molto bene anche se il campeggio era veramente molto affollato !
Amazing spot, very well priced and the staff go above and beyond to help. Stayed here for months this year for university placement.  Highly recommend.

Kind people, good places and clean camping
(We had a campervan)
Close to town, small tight park so if you can't park up it's probably not for you. Camp kitchen and facilities great. Ensuite site for van clean and roomy.

Stayed on a powered site by pool .no complaints re site although small ..adequate
Staff are amazing ..and camp facilities are good ...toilets showers are quite modern ..but ..that's the only positive
We stayed for ten nights and during this time even though yes we did see a cleaner ..the cleaning of toilets and showers were not good..same paper rubbish sitting for days and filthy
Maybe management need to check these facilities each day ..both male and female as this is really letting this great camp ground down ..
Good entertainment and happy times provided by the camp at the camp kitchen ..thankyou very much
We keep coming back. 3 visit.

So the campsite is a little hard to review based on the standard google questions so I’ve amended one or two, to better reflect our stay of two nights.

We had our own camper so ‘rooms’ doesn’t really fit so I’ll use ‘pitch’ and the non powered pitch was fine. Tucked away in the far corner you didn’t really hear much from the site itself but we were located near a main road but again this wasn’t to bad either.

Service was actually very good. A swift checking in process and no need to check out as long as you are gone by the time agreed. Staff were very friendly.

Location. Probably a ten minute ride from the local airport and situated no more than a five minute drive to the centre of Cairns town centre so all in all pretty well positioned.

We had been informed through other sources that the site had been subject to a few thefts. We had no real context of what had actually happened so like any responsible traveller we ensured everything was locked and anything critical to our journey remained with us. A really positive was the security patrolled the site at night so if there had been issues NRMA were taking it seriously.

Decent site and I would use again in fact we just used the NRMA site in Airlie Beach so a reviews will be added shortly.

Booked for two nights, only stayed for one. Spaces are so small you can’t get anything out, could hardly open our doors. Not that it matters as the site felt unsafe so wouldn’t have wanted to sit out around there anyway. Loud music playing all night and stinky facilities.

My husband and I stayed one night, we found the staff pleasent and the facilities clean. However the caravan sites are very tight, we were unable to erect our awning and there was no room to park our car( it had to be parked across the road. Overall we found this park to have serious safety issues....the road is very narrow making it very difficult to maneuver your car and caravan, and some of the sites were under fruiting Jackfruit, with amount of cars and vans packed in so tightly I wouldn't recommend for families with children.
Road traffic noise along with planes taking off and landing.

Stayed last 5 nights in a powered site, and the office was really helpful as we were in a jam as we had car issues from the Cape, heading straight to Cairns for help by mechanics and they were so willing to get us a spot and hold it open for us for as long as we needed.
But because your so close to the people next to you it totally depends on who your put next to. We unfortunately were put next to people that smoked cigarettes constantly all day/night beside us even though their not allowed, just sat outside their bus and smoked and no one from the park came along and told them to stop. Stunk us out as everyone is so close together. They had 2 dogs and a cat that they would yell at them at all hours, 1-2am in the morning after letting them out. Coughed their lungs up constantly, sounded like they had influenza,  burping, loud music. We got woken up every day and keep up by them every night. They’d been there for 6weeks or so apparently.
We were stuck there as we had car issues so couldn’t move.
Nice park if you could enjoy it however it’s jammed packed with people and like I said totally depend on who your put next too.

Great caravan park, quite and lots of shade, excellent location close to town, lovely and clean, reception staff very good and helpful, you can get a great coffee at reception and they stock a few essential items … milk bread washing powder biscuits etc.

We booked for 2 Rooftop tent and we couldn’t set up our tent because of the small size of the sites ! No correct solution was proposed by reception.
Worst NRMA Camping ever ! 44$ is so expensive. Go to Tasman or Ingenia !

Great park for visiting Cairns. Not too far from the city and the Esplanade.

The only thing that we noticed in comparison with previous years is that the maintenance of plants and trees has declined.

Many trees have low hanging parts that touch your caravan.

Staff remains super friendly!
the night security follows you to the bathroom and even asks you to open the door to ask you stupid questions, no excuses, nothing, they are useless.
Good if you have caravan less than 18". Sqeezy is the word I'm looking for. Location good, catch the 123 to town.

We stayed two nights on an unpowered site.
The park was very busy and everyone is packed in quite closely.
The unpowered sites are quite small. We were very lucky to have no one next to us for our two night stay, so could spread out a little.  Getting a car & gazebo onto the site was tight.
The amenities were very clean, although I did unfortunately run out of hot water a minute into one of my showers.
The camp kitchen is very good.  Fridges, freezers, two sinks, 8 hotplates, 2 induction plates, plus gas bbqs.
Lots of shady trees throughout the whole site, and easy walking distance to the sea.  Location was great for us.
Wonderful place to visit. Great sites. Great anmematies.

We camped here for 1 night. Yes options of camping in cairns is limited and reviews of other campsites not great however this definitely did not meet our expectations of all other NRMA parks we’ve visited, clean amenities yes, but that’s it!
Out ‘site’ was literally a parking space. Very boggy aswell ( rain can’t be helped I know). We had no room to sit by our car or set up any sized awning. We were parked next to a jucy van and we couldn’t both have our doors open at the same time.
Also the park is right by the main road and under a flight path.
All this for $45! A rip off

EDIT- There is a free camp 30 mins south of Cairns, with toilets and just as cramped.. do yourselves a favour and save $45 :)

A 7 minuti di macchina dal centro di Cairns, circa 40' a piedi, questo campeggio è servito anche da un bus pubblico (123) e da altri che arrivano vicino. Ci sono tanti servizi (lavatrice, asciugatrice, stireria), complesso sportivo e campo base per camper. La reception è molto attiva per prenotare escursioni e supportare. Le camere delle casette sono abbastanza larghe e con 3 letti (uno sopra per lasciare più spazio). I bagni sono puliti continuamente e la security passa continuamente. Un bagno solo è poco per tante casette, ma ce ne sono altri a pochi passi, al centro del campeggio. Buon rapporto qualità prezzo.  L'aeroporto è a 15' di taxi o uber.

We have stayed 4 weeks and loved it very much. We normally checked out on the weekend to go explore and we were back and they had no problem with us booking this way. The park is tight but plenty of room for our little HiAce van.
The bathroom and kitchen are well kept and we were especially grateful for the freezer!
Beautiful birds everywhere and options for shady sites and sunny sites. It can get a little muddy in the rain but that's because there is so much wonderful greenery to enjoy. The staff are helpful  and very friendly, giving plenty of recommendations of places to go and activities around, which you can book at the campsite. It's also a great location to get around from and made it easy to explore the city while here.
They offer morning tea every second Tuesday and reef talks that same Wednesday for free which is a way to gather and meet people if you're willing to come along and chat.
Highly recommend 10/10
A powered site was chosen to stay for 5 nights. All services for camping were available and packed with all sorts of plants.

We’ve stayed here twice.  Once in our Motorhome for a week and also in a lodging for a few nights when we were waiting for Fiat to fix it. Both stays were great, the amenities are modern and clean. The site is well located just 30 mins walk to central Cairns and 20 mins to some great walks on Mount Whitfield and the botanical gardens. Fiat fixed our Motorhome quicker than anticipated and Bethany in reception was super helpful and flexible in letting us shorten our stay and refunding unused nights. We’d definitely stay here again on our next visit to Cairns. Thanks again Bethany 👍

A disappointing stay. As an NRMA park we had high expectations, but this park let us down. Our unpowered pitch was sandwiched between the driveway and a chain link fence, and this was after we had been moved from the other unpowered van sites, which in reality are more like glorified grass parking spots with no space to set up anything around your van. It felt like the priority was given to large vehicles on powered sites, and the unpowered sites existed to squeeze more people on and make more money in an already small park. The facilities and camp kitchen redeem this site slightly, with plenty of warm showers, power sockets at each picnic bench, and plenty of BBQs for use. However in the camp kitchen there are only 2 hobs which are squeezed into a corner making it impossible for more than 1/2 people to use them at any one time. There are 3 big fridges, but unfortunately we had food stolen from our bags whilst they were in the fridge. Although I understand this isn't the fault of the staff, the receptionist told me this is a common problem, so it seems strange that there is not CCTV in the kitchen area and that the existing locks on the fridges are not utilised. We stayed at another site where thefts were occurring and the park responded by locking the fridges from 10pm-7am, perhaps something this park could consider? We didn't use the pool on site as it was small and surrounded by campsites. The location is fairly central given this is a city, with bus access and the lagoon a 30-40 minute walk along the promenade. At $44 a night for unpowered camping we expected more, so we would not stay again.

Friendly service but only 3 stars as the sites are very small and it's too cramped. Wet weather whilst I was there made accessing the amenities a muddy experience and you needed to navigate around parked cars.  Amenities clean enough and well located for pickups for tours or access to the CBD.

Stayed in our caravan. Lady at reception was lovely. That's where it ended. Bins overflowing & bags surrounding them. Turned on shower & handles fell off
Absolutely zero water pressure. 20 mins to take a 2 min shower. There for 3 nights & toilets n shower blocks weren't cleaned in that time.

What a poorly managed place, a real blight on the NRMA G’day park name, please audit this park.
We couldn’t see out our full stay as we were concerned that the kids or ourselves would get sick.
The amenities both male and female were putrid, even after they were “cleaned”. The walls, doors, floors, windows and whole facilities have possibly never been cleaned properly. Poo marks and god knows what on walls and doors and in vents for days on end. The male urinal looked like a pool of slime every day. The showers ( I tried 4 of them) didn’t work properly and were filthy. I honestly believe they just mopped the floors each day as the same toilet paper was wet and in the same corners of toilets each day. You wouldn’t touch the toilet brush for fear of disease.
Rubbish bins were not emptied at timely intervals so rubbish had spilled out onto the ground.
The pool… oh god … better named the cess pool was just cloudy and disgusting for the 4 days we did manage to stay there.
Really small sites and people crammed everywhere.
Terrible experience NRMA Cairns, I should send you an invoice for spoiling our supposed 7 days in cairns.
Buenísimo

Very good and comfortable stay at the the cabin.
Thanks
Great location, amenities clean, staff friendly, drive through sites but a bit tight to get into though.
Friendly staff and good location

We had a lovely stay here. Beautiful trees and surrounds. Amenities clean. Really do pack folk in. Would be nice to see the grounds better kept. Lots of beautiful birdlife in the park. There is aircraft and train noise. Sites tight to get into. Keep your things secure as there are lots of folk wandering around. There is a resident bat colony too!

I stayed in a lodge for a few nights.||What I liked:|- Reception staff are friendly & helpful|- Bed was comfortable|- Easy to get to Cairns by bus (if one doesn’t have a car)||What I liked less:|- I arrived at midnight and there was no one to check me in. The keys had been left in a safe box and were easy to find. However, it was challenging to find the lodge in this huge holiday park at night when all lights had been turned off. I was travelling solo and it wasn’t great! Also, I bumped into someone who looked quite rough that evening. He was wearing torn clothes & seemed intoxicated. He didn’t look like a guest.|- It’s a bit edgy. The taxi drivers were constantly telling me to be careful in this neighborhood, especially at night.

We stayed twice. Once in a chalet and second time in the camping area. The biggest complaint was they like smokers and we are non-smokers. Good value for money. Pool looked good but didn't get to it.  The kitchen area very busy with loud foreigners and far from toilets. Allocated next to busy road. Toilets per person ratio seemed low.
Great location & quiet despite being in the city!
20 min walk to cairns

This campsite is closest to the city. Probably therefore, it is a very busy site with not a lot of space between the campsites, although it is not too bad at all. Unfortunately, we were put on a spot that is probably the roughest in the campground; uneven, triangle shaped, with the water hookup quite far out and poor wifi reception. It was however quite photogenic since a huge true was hanging over it. Campground's got nice amenities and a nice pool but just 6 poolbeds to go around, which are of course continuously in use. Don't get me wrong; we did have a nice stay but were just unlucky with the site I guess. It was a 30 to 40 minute walk from there to the downtown Cairns-area.
Park is clean, tidy and welcoming. But.. camp sites are small and the roads are narrow. Stayed beginning of June (not peak time) and they’re packing people in tight.
